hero.title: 3×3 Rubik's Cube Tutorial
hero.subtitle: Learn to solve it in 7 steps!
hero.description: The most comprehensive beginner-friendly Rubik's Cube tutorial in Traditional Chinese, featuring an interactive 3D model and the Layer-by-Layer method.

tutorial.title: Layer-by-Layer Tutorial
tutorial.desc: Seven steps from the white cross to a complete solve, each with 3D animation.

algorithms.title: Algorithm Cheat Sheet
algorithms.desc: All commonly used algorithms at a glance — click to watch 3D demos.

timer.title: Speedsolve Timer
timer.desc: WCA-standard scrambles with automatic ao5 & ao12 stats to track your progress.

q1.q: I've never touched a Rubik's Cube. Can I still learn?
q1.a: Absolutely! Our Layer-by-Layer tutorial is designed for complete beginners. We guide you step-by-step with an interactive 3D cube so you can see every move clearly.

q2.q: How long does it take to learn the LBL method?
q2.a: Most people can learn to solve the cube in 1-3 days with regular practice. After that, you can improve your speed over time.

q3.q: What do R, U, F and other letters mean?
q3.a: These are standard Rubik's Cube notations: R (Right), U (Up), F (Front), L (Left), D (Down), B (Back). An apostrophe (') means counterclockwise 90°, and 2 means 180°.

q4.q: Can I use this site offline?
q4.a: Offline support is currently under development and will be available in a future update. Please ensure you have an internet connection for now.

q5.a: Yes, our timer uses the WCA (World Cube Association) standard random scramble algorithm.

tutorial.title: Layer-by-Layer Tutorial
tutorial.subtitle: Solve a 3×3 Rubik's Cube in 7 Steps

notation.title: Notation Guide
notation.desc: Before we begin, let's learn the rotation notation:

step1.title: Step 1: White Cross
step1.goal: Goal: Form a cross on the white face, matching edge side colors with center pieces.
step1.desc: Hold the cube with the white center on top. Find the four white edge pieces and place them one by one. This step is mainly intuitive — no fixed algorithm.
step1.tips: Tip: Locate the white edge piece first, then figure out the shortest path to its target position.

step2.title: Step 2: White Corners
step2.goal: Goal: Complete the entire white face (first layer).
step2.desc: Insert the four white corner pieces into the correct positions. Hold the white face on the bottom and use the algorithm below.
step2.algo: R U R' U' (repeat 1-5 times until corner is placed)

step3.title: Step 3: Middle Layer Edges
step3.goal: Goal: Complete the first two layers (F2L).
step3.desc: Place the four middle layer edge pieces. Find an edge in the top layer without yellow, align it, and insert.
step3.algo_right: U R U' R' U' F' U F (insert edge to the right)
step3.algo_left: U' L' U L U F U' F' (insert edge to the left)

step4.title: Step 4: Yellow Cross
step4.goal: Goal: Form a cross on the yellow face.
step4.desc: Only the yellow edges need to face up — side alignment doesn't matter yet. Observe the top face pattern (dot, L-shape, line).
step4.algo: F R U R' U' F'

step5.title: Step 5: Yellow Face
step5.goal: Goal: Make the entire yellow face solid yellow.
step5.desc: Orient all yellow corners so they face up. Check the orientation of yellow corners to choose the right starting position.
step5.algo: R U R' U R U2 R'

step6.title: Step 6: Position Top Corners
step6.goal: Goal: Move all top-layer corners to their correct positions (orientation may still be wrong).
step6.desc: Find one corner already in the correct position, place it at the front-right, then execute the algorithm.
step6.algo: U R U' L' U R' U' L

step7.title: Step 7: Position Top Edges
step7.goal: Goal: Solve the cube! Move the last edges into the correct positions.
step7.desc: Observe which direction the edges need to cycle (clockwise or counterclockwise).
step7.algo_cw: R U' R U R U R U' R' U' R2 (clockwise 3-edge cycle)
step7.algo_ccw: R2 U R U R' U' R' U' R' U R' (counterclockwise 3-edge cycle)
step7.congrats: Congratulations! 🎉 Keep practicing to improve your speed!

timer.title: Speedsolve Timer
timer.subtitle: WCA-standard scrambles — track your times
timer.instruction: Press Space or tap the timer to start / stop

about.title: About
about.desc: This is a 3×3 Rubik's Cube tutorial site built for Traditional Chinese speakers. Our goal is to make solving the Rubik's Cube accessible to everyone.
about.tech: Built with HTML5, CSS3 (Bootstrap 5.3), and JavaScript (Three.js). Deployed on GitHub Pages. Fully open source.
about.contact: For suggestions or bug reports, please open an issue on GitHub.
about.license: Content is licensed under the Apache License 2.0.
